arts.ttl: Tottenham drop early quadruple Southampton team news hint as Postecoglou has Man Utd decision
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have hinted that Dejan Kulusevski and Dominic Solanke will return to the team at Southampton after their contributions as substitutes against the Rangers. Solanke had played the full 90 minutes in all but one of the team's matches since the November international break, only missing the draw with Fulham due to illness.

arts.ttl: Tottenham looking to raid English club for 25-year-old due to injury crisis
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are one of the clubs looking to sign the Leeds United defender Pascal Struijk. The 25-year-old Dutch international defender has done quite well in the Championship and Tottenham are following him closely. They need to add more depth to their defensive unit and the 25-year-old would be a quality addition. arts.ttl: Postecoglou tells 'bruised egos' to fight for Spurs
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has demanded his Tottenham Hotspur players show more fight and says he has no time for "bruised egos", after describing Timo Werner’s performance in their 1-1 draw with Rangers "unacceptable". Postecoglou says his criticism after the UEFA Europa League draw in Glasgow extended beyond Werner, as he asked for more from his senior players this weekend following four defeats from seven Premier League matches.
